blended.narrative: Sasquatch Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 4,993 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 50°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Tuesday: 3.0" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Wednesday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
